items.action: Make iPhone Safari audio audibly measurable and verify the deployed commit.
remaining: confirm Vercel serves commit 9dad5e8355a3795df8e049408c3175a1c0836ab8 or later
run deterministic test in an executable checkout or CI
capture iPhone audible outcome paired with runtime classification

items.action: Verify two gesture sequences produce divergent bounded visual state while invariants remain stable.
Resolve and prove the actual Cloudflare Pages hostname and deployment.
items.blocker: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, then dispatch the committed workflow. The workflow deploys the committed source, obtains Cloudflare's returned deployment URL, runs the identity verifier, and retains a JSON proof artifact.

items.action: Define and deploy a creative site with a visual and behavioral identity unrelated to Mirror Cartographer.
Build a provenance-preserving index of chat, file, commit, and decision history without exposing private material.
Identify one current primary-source advance that materially improves browser audio, generative graphics, multi-agent coordination, or scientific reasoning and convert it into a tested artifact.

progress.finding: Use output render-position advance, not AudioContext.state alone, as the strongest browser-visible evidence that audio blocks are processing.

items.handoff: Vercel Studio should invoke observeAudioStart inside the direct sound-start gesture and compare render classification with an iPhone audible report or device-level meter.
